hero.about: 👋 Hi! I'm Siro, an AI engineer focused on designing and building intelligent systems that solve real-world problems. I work with LLM-based solutions, agentic workflows, and automation, and I'm the co-founder of Artekia, an AI consultancy helping startups and SMEs adopt and apply AI with measurable business impact.

projects.title: OpenThinking
projects.desc: Open-source multi-LLM agent orchestration framework for building pipelines, orchestrators, and collaborative AI workflows, with shared context, access policies, and reusable skills across any provider.

projects.title: Climate Installer Assistant
projects.desc: AI assistant that turns technical visit data into ready-to-sign quotes and installation certificates. 70% less time writing quotes and zero transcription errors.

projects.title: Law Firm Automation
projects.desc: Automation system for judicial notifications and deadlines for a firm with 200+ active cases: monitors LexNET and court portals, classifies and alerts via WhatsApp/email, and runs a procedural calendar with alerts at 7, 3 and 1 day. Zero missed deadlines and -40% admin time.

projects.title: Sellervate
projects.desc: CRM and visual editor platform for Amazon sellers. I led its evolution to v2.0 and integrated AI to generate and improve creatives faster and more consistently.

projects.title: ChatPol
projects.desc: Redesigned a slow monolithic chatbot into a multi-agent RAG system that routes each query to a specialist agent (Traffic, Criminal, Immigration). Response time cut from 50s to under 10s (-80%).

projects.title: Costume Distributor Pipeline
projects.desc: Multi-agent system that turns warehouse photos into ready e-commerce listings: data-cleaning and normalization agents plus an image-generation agent (Nano Banana) producing studio-quality photos. 90% time saved.

projects.title: DevPath
projects.desc: An AI-powered platform for learning and practicing programming, designed for all skill levels.

projects.title: Portfolio
projects.desc: My personal portfolio, built with Astro, featuring a modern and minimalist design.

experience.title: Co-Founder
experience.description: Software and AI boutique for startups and SMEs, focused on building useful products, automating processes, and solving real business problems with technical quality and transparency.

experience.title: Full Stack Frontend Developer
experience.description: Developed Sellervate's web application using Next.js, Python, PostgreSQL, and AWS.

experience.title: IT Support Technician
experience.description: Led the layout and pre-production area within the support department, working with technologies such as vSphere, Python, Nagios, Whisper AI, and network administration.

experience.title: Support Technician (Internship)
experience.description: Completed my vocational training internship here, where I gained hands-on experience with technologies such as Nagios, ESXi, and server administration.

education.course: Master's in Artificial Intelligence and Big Data
education.description: Deepening my expertise in data analysis, machine learning, generative AI, AI agent systems, and neural networks.
Consolidating server-side web development, interface development, Web3, and DevOps.
Learned a wide range of programming languages including Python, Kotlin, C#, AL, Visual Basic, Unity, and Oracle SQL.

education.course: Vocational Diploma in Microcomputer Systems and Networks (SMR)
education.description: Trained as an IT technician, building a strong foundation in networking, hardware, and programming concepts.

certifications.title: Azure Data Scientist Associate
certifications.description: Train, deploy, and monitor machine learning models with Azure Machine Learning.

certifications.title: Azure AI Engineer Associate
certifications.description: Design and implement AI solutions using Azure AI services, Azure AI Search, and Azure Open AI.

certifications.title: Fabric Data Engineer Associate
certifications.description: Design, build, and implement enterprise-scale data analytics solutions.

certifications.title: Azure Database Administrator Associate
certifications.description: Understanding of core data concepts and their implementation using Microsoft Azure data services.

certifications.title: Azure Data Fundamentals
certifications.description: Core data concepts and Azure data services (relational, non-relational, and analytics workloads).

certifications.title: CCNA R&S
certifications.description: Fundamental concepts of networks and subnetting, including router and switch configuration.

certifications.title: CyberOps Associate
certifications.description: Creation of secure environments, attack classification, network monitoring, and evasion techniques.

certifications.title: AWS Cloud Developing
certifications.description: Build, deploy, and manage cloud applications and infrastructure on AWS.

certifications.title: AWS Cloud Architecting
certifications.description: Identify features to build resilient, secure, and highly available IT solutions on AWS Cloud.
